ContactReplace.description: Complete replacement payload; omitted optional values reset to defaults.
ContactReplace.title: ContactReplace

info.description: A modern Django API with JWT authentication
info.title: Django API Starter

post.description: Send a reset email when the account exists; always return a generic response.

get.description:
List contacts with optional search and sorting.

Query Parameters:
- search: Optional search term to filter contacts
- sort_by: Field to sort by (display_name, first_name, last_name, email, created_at, updated_at)
- sort_order: Sort order (asc or desc)

post.description: Upload and set avatar for a contact. Stores small and large sizes, updates avatar_path.

get.description: Return the paginated tag list for an organization. Supports ordering by name or id.

post.description: Create a tag in an organization. Tag names must be unique within that organization.

get.description: Return one tag from an organization by its slug.
Search tags in an organization by case-insensitive partial name.

delete.description: Remove multiple tag ids from an organization-scoped object.

get.description: Manage tags attached to a polymorphic object identified by app label, model name, and object id.

post.description: Assign up to 50 tag names to an organization-scoped object. Missing tags are created in that organization.

delete.description: Remove one tag from an object by tag slug. Missing tags are treated as already removed.
Delete one organization tag by id.

patch.description: Rename an organization tag and regenerate its slug.

post.description: Handles avatar upload: validates, deletes old, resizes, uploads, updates DB.
